allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd"\) { & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" --version }; if \(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm\\nvm.exe"\) { nvm list })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe node 2>$null; $env:Path -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node' })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\ -Filter "node.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 4 | Select-Object -First 5 FullName; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE" -Filter "node.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 3 | Select-Object -First 5 FullName)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); cd d:\\vs-claude; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item package-lock.json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
